subject: Midnight Express
body:
Jeffrey,

 

Here are some new picture of the enclosure frame.

 

As I understand it we are painting the frame white and the glass is
smoked gray.

 

Please let me know if this is what you would like or did you have
something different in mind.

 

Thank you

 

Emad Hanna

Project Controller

NES, LLC

457 Madison Ave

New York, NY 10022

subject: Midnight Express
body:
Enclosed please find a few photos of today's fitting. They added a top
center frame to the front. They will remove the hard top and take it for
powder coat and come again on the 3rd of January for final fitting
without the hard top.

 

Once all the fitting is completed the glass will take 6-8 weeks.

 

Also the Scorpion hull has been completed and they will complete the
boat when they secure a buyer. They informed me they changed the boat to
an open boat to make it more marketable to sell and would tie up less of
their money. They will forward me some pictures of a similar boat for
your review.

 

Thank You
body_html:
Enclosed please find a few photos of today's fitting. They added a top center frame to the front. They will remove the hard top and take it for powder coat and come again on the 3rd of January for final fitting without the hard top.

 

Once all the fitting is completed the glass will take 6-8 weeks.

 

Also the Scorpion hull has been completed and they will complete the boat when they secure a buyer. They informed me they changed the boat to an open boat to make it more marketable to sell and would tie up less of their money. They will forward me some pictures of a similar boat for your review.

 

Thank You
